summary: Iteration 62 - GPT-5.2 Vision Biometrics Integration Testing Complete. All backend API tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests verified AI Biometric Verification section, image upload zones, GPT-5.2 badge display, and detailed forensic checks. Real GPT-5.2 Vision integration confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: GPT-5.2 Vision integration correctly implemented in ai_verifier_service.py using emergentintegrations LlmChat with ImageContent
Ceremony routes properly branch on has_id_image/has_selfie flags - real AI vs simulated verification
Images stored separately in ceremony_images collection (not in main ceremony doc) - good for performance
Frontend correctly displays GPT-5.2 badge when agent.details.ai_powered is true
AI Verifier returns detailed forensic checks (font_consistency, photo_alignment, hologram_presence, edge_integrity)
SSE streaming works correctly with both AI-powered and simulated Verifier modes
seed_data_creation: Created test ceremonies with prefix 'TEST_' including: TEST_NoImages_Document, TEST_IDOnly_Document, TEST_BothImages_Document, TEST_SSE_Simulated_Document, TEST_SSE_AI_Document, TEST_AI_Forensics_Document, TEST_ImageStorage_Document, TEST_List_NoImages, TEST_List_WithImages, Playwright Test No Images
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPT-5.2 Vision biometrics integration fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/ceremony/start (with id_image_base64/selfie_base64), GET /api/ceremony/{id}/stream (SSE), POST /api/ceremony/{id}/execute. AI Verifier uses real GPT-5.2 Vision when images provided, simulated when not. Frontend shows 'AI BIOMETRICS' badge in header and 'GPT-5.2' badge in Verifier Agent card when AI-powered. Forensic checks displayed include font_consistency, photo_alignment, hologram_presence, edge_integrity.
